summary: Unknown recording source with average sound, but the second set’s China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider lifts the night despite a brief opening set.
review: The show is described as a mixed bag: an opening six‑pack that felt short, followed by a stronger second set where the China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider sequence “picked things up.” Jerry’s vocal on Stella Blue was called heart‑wrenching, and the reviewer missed Brent while wishing Bruce Hornsby had stayed longer. No specific audio comments were given, so recording quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; show is average with a few highlights and no concrete information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any aspects of sound clarity, mix balance, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening set described as a short six‑pack; second set picks up momentum with China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider and an emotionally charged Stella Blue.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal on Stella Blue was called heart‑wrenching, leaving the reviewer unsure if it was beautiful.
band_member_comments.Keys: Reviewer missed Brent and wished Bruce Hornsby had stayed longer.
